guide.title: Cultivation Guide
guide.sub: Follow the 3-stage system to grow Cordyceps Militaris
s1step1c: [Medium has to be prepared as per the provide chart]
s1step2c: After preparation of PDA Medium, distribute immediate in the Whisky Bottle {30 to 40 m.l} (or) Boiling Tube {10 to 15 m.l} Before it change to Solid form.
Cover with Absorbent Cotton and Cut or News Paper.
Keep in the Autoclave at 15 PSI / 121°C for 40 Minutes
s1step3c: After 40 minutes Sterilization take out the PDA Medium from the Autoclave.
Keep all the PDA Medium bottle in Slanting [10° to 15°] Position for 5 days.
Discard any Contaminated PDA Medium is seen during the waiting period 5 days
s1step4c: Cut a slice from the top of the well - grown Mother Mushroom and place it at Centre of the PDA Medium [ Whisky Bottle or Boiling tube, After 5 Days waiting Period ]
s1step5c: [ Dark - Cover with Black or Blue Thick Cloth ]
Remove the Cloth Cover before 2 days . ( 19th day )
Give diffused light on 19th day & 20th day.
Now the Culture changes from White to Yellow and Orange Colour.
guide.s1f: NOW THE BASE CULTURE IS READY
s2step1c: [Medium has to prepared as per the provide chart]
s2step2c: After preparation of Liquid Medium distribute in the Saline bottle (or) Conical Flask ( 250 to 300 m.l )
Cover with Non Absorbent Cotton and Paper
Keep in the Autoclave at 15 PSI / 121°C for 40 Minutes
s2step3c: After 40 minutes Sterilization take out the Liquid Medium from the Autoclave.
Keep all the Liquid Medium in Normal Position for cooling 1 day only (less than 24 Hrs)
s2step4c: Cut a 1 C.M Square Piece from the 20 days Old Solid Base Culture and put inside the Sterilized Liquid Medium
s2step5c: [Dark - Cover with Black (or) Blue Colour Thick Cloth]

{ If We need More Conidia - From 2nd day Onwards } Rotate the Saline Bottles 5 times Clockwise and 5 times Anti Clockwise [ Daily Morning and Evening for 5 days only, up to 6th Day ] Let Stand Static for the remaining 14 Days
If We don't need more Conidia - Let Stand Static all the days
Remove the Cloth Cover before 2 days (19th Day)
Now the Culture Changes from White to Yellow and then Orange Colour
guide.s2f: NOW THE LIQUID (OR) COMMERCIAL SPAWN IS READY
s3step1c: [Medium has to be prepared as per the provide chart]
s3step2c: Take 20 grams Brown Rice in Lug Jar (or) Glass Bottle and pour (mix) 32 m.l Basal Medium
[For 1 gram Rice 1.6 m.l Basal Medium is required]
s3step3c: After preparation of the Lug Jar (or) Glass Bottle, cover the Lid Air hole with absorbent Cotton (or) Micropore tape
Keep in the Autoclave at 15 PSI 121°C for 40 minutes
After 40 minutes Sterilization take out the Lug Jar/ Bottle from the Auto clave.
Keep all the Bottle in Normal Position for cooling 1 day (less than 24 Hrs.)
s3step4c: Take Sterilize Lug Jar / Glass Bottle
Add (pour) 10 m.l to 15 m.l Liquid Spawn
[Dark - Cover with Black / Blue Colour Thick Cloth]
s3step5c: Remove the Cloth Cover over the Lug jar/ Glass Bottle on 11th day
Give 500 Lux diffused light from 11th day onwards
Give 700 Lux diffused light from 16th day onwards
from 21st day onwards up to 60th day Give 800 to 1000 Lux direct Light
s3step6c: Harvest can be done between 56th Day to 60th Day
